lead_profile_text: Primary residence owner who travels frequently; wants professional STL management while away. 1-bed flat, 37 Balfour Road, Stapleford NG9 7GA. Key safe already in place. Property available from 16th August 2026 (Marcus away through end of year). Source: inline meeting summary (not Granola).
emotional_profile: Pragmatic and analytical. Proactively raised ramp-up timeline, seasonality, and worst-case projections — research-led behaviour. Knows about Airbnb algorithm boosts and competitor review counts. Needs to trust Stayful can run everything hands-off while abroad. Clear go-live date set.
delay_trigger_phrases: Away from 16th August through end of year
delay_timeline: Property available from 16th August 2026. On-site windows: 3rd-4th and 11th-14th August for inspection/photography.
green_light_trigger_phrases: Available for on-site visits 3rd-4th August and 11th-14th August

top_objections.text: Will income be lower initially until reviews build?
top_objections.zac_response: Yes — expect slightly lower returns until ~10-15 good reviews achieved. Worst-case ~15% below projections. New listings also get a platform boost in month one.

top_objections.text: What is the seasonality pattern? When are the best and worst months?
top_objections.zac_response: July and August are best months. March is worst. Launching in August is good timing — rough season is ahead, not immediately behind.

top_objections.text: What if projections aren't hit — what's the worst case?
top_objections.zac_response: ~15% below projections until reviews build. Estimated 10-14 months to reach full competitive performance.

top_objections.text: How does the Airbnb new listing algorithm boost work?
top_objections.zac_response: New listings get elevated visibility on platform in month one. Drop-off won't be severe as reviews start to accumulate.

top_questions.text: How long until I reach full revenue potential?
top_questions.answer: Estimated 10-14 months to reach full competitive performance. New listings get a platform boost in month one. Worst-case ~15% below projections until reviews build.

top_questions.text: What are the best and worst months seasonally?
top_questions.answer: July and August are best. March is worst. Launching in August means the tough season comes later, not immediately.

top_questions.text: How do I block dates or communicate ad hoc when I'm abroad?
top_questions.answer: Blocking via centralised calendar and Slack — drop a message to flag blocked dates or trigger a clean. Key safe means Marcus doesn't need to be present for any operational tasks.

top_questions.text: What happens to my personal belongings while guests are in?
top_questions.answer: Recommend locking personal items in a restricted room or cupboard that guests never access.

what_moved_them: Key safe already in place — eliminates biggest practical onboarding friction
Blocking via Slack and live calendar — visible, low-friction control from abroad
Personal items locked in a restricted room — simple practical solution accepted
6-month fixed term with 3-month rolling notice — not a long lock-in
Seasonality timing — launching at the start of a good period (August)

conversion_gaps.gap: Offer expires 3 July — tight window, decision still pending
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Send written summary confirming discount. Highlight that delay past 3 July costs ~£167/week in missed August income.

conversion_gaps.gap: Decision not made on call — 'come back with a decision'
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Written summary with all discussed points to facilitate decision. Touch base before 3 July deadline.

offer_framing: 13% + VAT (standard 15%), expires 3 July 2026. Launching in August — good seasonal window. Delay past 3 July costs ~£167/week in missed August income.
zac_close_phrase: Touch base in a couple of weeks
zac_income_intro: Figures based on comparable nearby properties (avg. 4.9 rating, ~73 reviews). Expect slightly lower returns until ~10-15 good reviews achieved. Worst-case: ~15% below projections.
zac_reassurance_phrases: New listings get a platform boost in month one — drop-off won't be severe
Worst-case: ~15% below projections until reviews build
Damage cover: up to £100,000 insurance for major incidents beyond the deposit
Payouts: statement on the 1st, payment between 1st and 5th for prior month's bookings
